description: A promotional callout block with a heading, optional body text, optional image, and one or more call-to-action links; typically rendered as a blue-bar sidebar aside or an image-led promotion panel.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Standard blue-bar promotional block with heading, body and a single link

props.heading: Find a PhD
props.body: Search for PhD opportunities at Sheffield and be part of our world-leading research.

stories.name: MultipleLinks
stories.description: Blue-bar block with multiple call-to-action links

stories.name: WithImage
stories.description: Promotion panel with a lead image, heading, body and a single link

props.heading: Experience Sheffield for yourself
props.body: The best way to find out what studying at Sheffield is like is to visit us. You'll get a feel for the atmosphere, the people, the campus and the city.
props.imageAlt: Numerous people walking around inside a bright white spacious building (The Wave).

stories.name: NoBody
stories.description: Blue-bar block with heading and link but no body text

notes: The root element always has both 'paragraph' and 'paragraph--type--para-promotion' classes. The 'blue-bar' modifier is present on ~86% of instances. The '.promo-link' (single link) and '.promo-links' (multiple links) are both rendered from the same 'links' array prop — use '.promo-links' wrapper when links.length > 1, otherwise '.promo-link'. The image, when present, sits before the inner content div and is wrapped in '.media--image--figure > figure.imgcapt > picture > img'.
htmlExamples:
Find a PhD

Search for PhD opportunities at Sheffield and be part of our world-leading research.

Find a project or supervisor

Ask us a question

Start a live chat
Email library@sheffield.ac.uk
Find your subject guide

Experience Sheffield for yourself

The best way to find out what studying at Sheffield is like is to visit us.

Visit us
